title: MessageUpdateInput.reaction_changes lacks caller ergonomics docs
description: MessageUpdateInput.reaction_changes: &'a [ReactionChange<'a>] (mod.rs:193) is a slice reference with lifetime. When callers construct a Vec<ReactionChange<'a>>, they must explicitly borrow it (&vec[..]). The current docs (mod.rs:192-193) give one sentence; they don't explain the lifetime borrow pattern or show a typical call pattern. A future maintainer unfamiliar with this design might refactor to Option<Vec<_>> or owned Vec, breaking all callers. Add doc example showing proper instantiation with a vector.
close_reason: Added usage example showing &changes[..] pattern to reaction_changes field doc
